description: Open-source legal agreement templates from CommonPaper, drafted by committees of attorneys and free to copy and modify.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: A standard software license agreement for licensing software to customers.

templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
templates.description: A mutual non-disclosure agreement for protecting confidential information shared between two parties.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement
templates.description: A cloud service agreement for SaaS and cloud-hosted software products.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement
templates.description: A data processing agreement for GDPR and privacy compliance between data controllers and processors.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement
templates.description: A service level agreement defining uptime commitments and remedies for cloud services.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement
templates.description: A professional services agreement for engagements involving consulting, implementation, or custom development.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: An agreement for early-stage design partner relationships, typically used for beta products.

templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: An addendum to existing agreements covering the use of AI features, data handling, and model training restrictions.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: A pilot agreement for limited-scope, time-bound evaluations of software or services.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: A partnership agreement for reseller, referral, or technology partner relationships.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement
templates.description: A business associate agreement for HIPAA compliance when handling protected health information.
